candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; matches ACT exactly.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets label from the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Explicit cash and cash equivalents balance sheet line; best match for CHE.
Possible cash balance component, but less preferable than the explicit cash and cash equivalents total.
Appears to be a component of cash rather than the total cash and equivalents line.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit total cash and cash equivalents line over component cash rows.

candidates.why: Explicit total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; matches LCT exactly.
Non-current liabilities, so not a match for LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities label.

candidates.why: There are two Borrowings rows; the later one appears in the current liabilities section and is the cleanest current debt total excluding leases.
Explicit current portion of long-term debt; useful if current borrowings were unavailable, but likely a component of current Borrowings.

variables.notes: OK. Chose the Borrowings row located within the current liabilities section as the preferred short-term debt measure. Excluded Current lease liability and Capital Lease Maturities per rule. Did not also select 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid double counting against the current Borrowings total.

candidates.why: Explicit current tax liabilities line; best match for taxes payable/current taxes payable.
Tax-related payable but not income taxes payable; less appropriate for TXP.

variables.notes: Used explicit current tax liabilities, which aligns with taxes payable under accruals definitions.

candidates.why: Explicit PPE balance sheet line; best available match for PPEGT.
Gross PPE would be acceptable if populated, but the direct PPE line is cleaner and appears reported.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit PPE line; preferred over gross/accumulated detail rows.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line on the balance sheet; matches AT exactly.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets label.

candidates.row_label: Net cash generated from operating activities
candidates.why: Explicit net cash from operating activities line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Net cash used in operating activities - discontinued operations
candidates.why: Only discontinued operations component, not total operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash generated from operating activities

variables.notes: Selected the total operating cash flow line, not the discontinued-operations subcomponent.
